SELECT COUNT(*) AS negative_count FROM numbers WHERE sign(val) = -1;
SELECT MAX(val) AS max_value, sign(MAX(val)) AS sign_of_max FROM numbers;
SELECT AVG(val) AS average_value, sign(AVG(val)) AS sign_of_avg FROM numbers;
CREATE TABLE more_numbers (id INT, val FLOAT);
SELECT n.val, mn.val, sign(n.val), sign(mn.val) FROM numbers n JOIN more_numbers mn ON sign(n.val) = sign(mn.val;
SELECT CASE WHEN sign(val) = -1 THEN 'Negative' WHEN sign(val) = 0 THEN 'Zero' ELSE 'Positive' END AS sign_description FROM numbers;
WITH sign_counts AS (SELECT sign(val) AS sign_val, COUNT(*) AS count FROM numbers GROUP BY sign_val) SELECT sign_val, count FROM sign_counts;
